title: Invoice Detail
description: Full view of a single invoice including customer info, line items, totals, payment status, and available actions.

elements.intent: Show invoice number and current status badge at a glance
Communicate payment status: Draft, Sent, Paid, or Overdue — drives what actions are available
Display key invoice metadata: customer, dates, service address, order reference, and priority
Show all work items with quantities, unit prices, and line totals
Display subtotal, tax, and total due
Show technician notes or special instructions recorded at order creation
Transition invoice status from Sent to Paid and record payment date
Trigger a payment reminder notification to the customer
Cancel the invoice; requires confirmation; irreversible
Navigate back to the customer list or new order form

conversation_history.changes: Added meta grid, line items table, totals, notes, and action buttons with status badge
